case_title: PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES VS. NOBUKO ANZAI et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT **PRE-JUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION**, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED FEB-04-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANZAI, NOBUKO
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ANZAI, NOBUKO

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT ANZAI, NOBUKO DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ANZAI, NOBUKO

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
